title: Level Z - Forcemaster
description: A LevelZ Addon for the Forcemaster mod.
body:
A LevelZ Addon for the Forcemaster mod.

This addon adds level requirements for Forcemaster weapons and armors to fit seemlessly with LevelZ. This way you can add the Forcemaster mod to your RPG modpacks without worrying about people skipping progression.

Did I miss something or do you have any further suggestions for other mods I should make compatible? Follow the discord link and let me know!
